operation.command: sudo apt clean && sudo journalctl --vacuum-time=7d && sudo rm -rf /tmp/* && sudo rm -rf ~/.cache/*

risk.reason: LLM assessed: Multiple cleanup operations with sudo: clearing apt cache, journal logs, and deleting /tmp and user cache. While intended for maintenance, the rm -rf commands could accidentally remove important files or data. Risks include potential data loss or system instability.
